creator: tony@git-pull.com
text:
(In reply to Michael Moll from comment #2)

As an update:

I'm talking this over on there tracker at https://github.com/sstephenson/ruby-build/issues/805#issuecomment-143547211. They are open to fixing this.

> I think it's no good to build rubygem-* ports with rbenv/rvm. Does it work with lang/ruby22 installed and used?

Maybe I'm misunderstanding, can you clarify this?

Do you mean that if the user's environment was sourced using rbenv/rvm, it could conflict with building ports?
